mapper.sql: permission_id, permission_name, permission_code, permission_type, parent_id, parent_name, order_num, path, component, query, status, del_flag, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time
mapper.select:
select
from sys_permission where permission_id = #{permissionId} and del_flag = '0'
mapper.update:
update sys_permission
permission_name = #{permissionName},
permission_code = #{permissionCode},
permission_type = #{permissionType},
parent_id = #{parentId},
order_num = #{orderNum},
path = #{path},
component = #{component},
query = #{query},
status = #{status},
remark = #{remark},
update_by = #{updateBy},
update_time = now()
where permission_id = #{permissionId}
update sys_permission set del_flag = '2', update_by = #{username}, update_time = now() where permission_id = #{permissionId}
update sys_permission set status = #{status}, update_time = now() where permission_id = #{permissionId} and del_flag = '0'
mapper.select:
select
from sys_permission where del_flag = '0' order by order_num asc

select
from sys_permission where permission_code = #{permissionCode} and del_flag = '0' limit 1

select
from sys_permission where permission_name = #{permissionName} and parent_id = #{parentId} and del_flag = '0' limit 1
